---
title: "Initial Public Offering: A Synthesis of the Literature and Directions for Future Research"
author:
  - name: Michelle Lowry
    equal-contributor: true
  - name: Roni Michaely
    equal-contributor: true
  - name: Ekaterina Volkova
    equal-contributor: true
date: "2017-11-01"
categories: [IPO, literature review, finance]
description: "Review Chapter in **Foundation and Trends in Finance** (2017)"
---

<p style="color:darkred; text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-style:italic;">Foundation and Trends in Finance (2017)</p>

<div class="btn-links" style="margin: 1.5rem 0;">
<a href="http://dx.doi.org/10.1561/0500000050" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">DOI</a>
<a href="https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=3014572" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">SSRN PDF (Free Access)</a>
<a href="https://www.nowpublishers.com/article/Details/FIN-050" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">Published Version</a>
<a href="https://github.com/volkovacodes/IPO-Review-Chapter" class="btn btn-outline-primary" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
<a href="ipo_appendix.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Data Appendix</a>
</div>

## Abstract

This review chapter provides a comprehensive synthesis of the academic literature on Initial Public Offerings (IPOs). We cover the major topics in IPO research, including underpricing, long-run performance, the role of underwriters, and the decision to go public. We also identify directions for future research in this important area of corporate finance.
